x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Owner
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies who is the owner of the collateral. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Servicing Party Role
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party that is acting on behalf of another party and that offers collateral management services. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Giver
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party which provides the collateral. A party can be both a taker and a giver in a collateral relationship. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Taker
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party which receives the collateral. A party can be both a taker and a giver in a collateral relationship. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Triparty Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Agent which acts as an intermediary between two parties for the administration of tri-party collateral transactions. (ISO20022)
